name: Anti-Recoil (Universal)
description: General anti-recoil script compatible with most FPS games. Reduces vertical recoil on automatic weapons.

name: Rapid Fire
description: Converts semi-automatic weapons to rapid fire. Works by rapidly pressing the trigger button.

name: Warzone Anti-Recoil
description: Optimized anti-recoil settings for Call of Duty Warzone. Tuned for ARs and SMGs.

name: Fortnite Build Macro
description: Automated build sequence for Fortnite. Executes a 90s or ramp-rush pattern.
values: BUILD_DELAY = 80, SEQUENCE = [wall, floor, ramp], REPEAT = false

name: Aim Assist Boost
description: Enhances natural aim assist by micro-adjusting stick input near targets.
